558.reason: [Using hardcoded offset curPos+3 for lookahead is unsafe and may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect parsing when token stream doesn't match expected pattern]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Using hardcoded offset curPos+3 for lookahead is unsafe and may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect parsing when token stream doesn't match expected pattern]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Hardcoded lookahead offset 'curPos + 3' is unreliable and may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect parsing when token stream doesn't match expected pattern]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Using fixed offset curPos+3 for lookahead is incorrect; it may go out of bounds or misidentify token context. The condition should check actual next tokens based on grammar, not arbitrary offsets.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Hardcoded lookahead offset 'curPos + 3' is unreliable and may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect parsing decisions when token stream doesn't match expected pattern]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [The lookahead of 3 tokens is arbitrary and incorrect; it fails to properly distinguish between Decl and FuncDef since both can start with 'int' or 'char', and the presence of LPARENT doesn't reliably indicate the end of declarations]

561.reason: [Using hardcoded offset curPos+2 for lookahead is unsafe and may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect parsing when token stream doesn't match expected pattern]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Using hardcoded offset curPos+2 for lookahead is unsafe and may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect parsing when token stream doesn't match expected pattern]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Hardcoded lookahead offset 'curPos + 2' is unreliable and may skip valid FuncDef or fail to detect MainFuncDef correctly]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Using fixed offset curPos+2 is similarly flawed; it doesn't correctly detect the start of MainFuncDef and may cause infinite loops or premature termination.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Hardcoded lookahead offset 'curPos + 2' is unreliable and fails to correctly identify the start of MainFuncDef in all valid cases, leading to missed declarations or incorrect function parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [The lookahead of 2 tokens is also arbitrary; FuncDef starts with FuncType (void/int/char) followed by Ident, not necessarily followed by MAINTK in 2 tokens. This condition may cause infinite loops or premature termination]
